name: libio-socket-socks-perl
title: libio-socket-socks-perl
summary: extension to IO::Socket providing SOCKS proxy
description:
extension to IO::Socket providing SOCKS proxy
IO::Socket::Socks connects to a SOCKS proxy, tells it to open a
connection to a remote host/port when the object is created.  The
object you receive can be used directly as a socket for sending and
receiving data from the remote host. In addition to create socks client
this module could be used to create socks server.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libio-socket-socks-perl because extension to IO::Socket providing SOCKS proxy.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libio-socket-socks-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libio-socket-socks-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libio-socket-socks-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
